0.text: Complete atelectasis of the right lower lobe

1.text: Atelectasis of the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Atelectasis in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Minimal pleural effusion on the left

4.text: Nodular soft tissue density at the level of the lower lobe of the right lung

5.text: Small area of ground-glass opacity in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

6.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in the aerated portions of both lungs
